turns.q: Can you compare your two most popular options and tell me which is better for me?
turns.replyTail:
Willow

Our two popular options are the Classic and Seasonal subscriptions.

The Classic subscription offers florist favourites, perfect for consistent quality and everyday enjoyment. The Seasonal subscription features blooms inspired by the time of year, ideal for those who love variety and unique arrangements.

If you prefer timeless bouquets, go for Classic. For seasonal flair, choose Seasonal. Both allow bouquet selection after the first delivery. Explore more here.
